landmines.name: ranking-ties-multiple-rows
landmines.kills: RANK()/DENSE_RANK() = 1, or a correlated MAX(play_count) subquery, returns two-or-more rows for a listener whose top two genres tie, breaking the one-row-per-listener contract; only ROW_NUMBER with a full tiebreak yields a single signature.

landmines.name: null-genre-ranked-as-genre
landmines.kills: Keeping NULL-genre plays and ranking them as an '(uncategorized)' bucket lets uncategorized win a listener's signature; NULL genre must be excluded before ranking.
